title: マイルCSの後に・ポカポカ大勝利！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Hishi Akebono wins the Mile Ch.!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though she's disappointed, Taiki Shuttle had
great fun in the race. All who witnessed the
overwhelming power are still enthralled.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sight of the celebratory audience warms Hishi
Akebono's heart, and she couldn't be happier!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Amid the ceaseless roars of the crowd, the Mile
Ch. comes to a close.
